title: Speaking: The Formal Interview
learningGoal: Speak using highly formal Sanskritized vocabulary and the subjunctive mood to demonstrate respect and professionalism.
instructions: You are in a formal job interview at a government office. You must not use any English words (no 'Question', 'Problem', 'Wait'). You must use pure Hindi (Shuddh Hindi) and the polite subjunctive mood when asking for permission.
speakingPrompt: Respond to the interviewer using highly formal Hindi.

subTasks.prompt: Interviewer is looking at papers. Ask politely: 'May I come in?' (May I = Kya main, Come = Aaun - Subjunctive)
Interviewer: 'Do you have any questions?' Reply: 'Yes, I have one question.' (Question = Prashna)
Interviewer: 'We have a problem with your application.' Reply: 'What is the solution to this problem?' (Problem = Samasya, Solution = Samadhan)

sampleResponse.targetText: इस समस्या का समाधान क्या है?
sampleResponse.transliteration: Is samasya ka samadhan kya hai?
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: What is the solution to this problem?

subTasks.prompt: Interviewer: 'You will have to wait.' Reply: 'I will wait.' (Wait = Pratiksha, I will do = Main karunga)

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: इस समस्या का समाधान क्या है?
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Is samasya ka samadhan kya hai?
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: What is the solution to this problem?

acceptableParaphrases: Saying 'Pratiksha karungi' is correct if the user is female.

criteria.name: Casual Vocabulary Penalty
criteria.description: If user says 'Sawaal', 'Pareshani', 'Hal', or 'Intezaar', deduct points. This is a test of formal Shuddh Hindi.

criteria.name: Subjunctive Failure
criteria.description: If user asks 'Kya main andar aa sakta hoon?', deduct points. They must use 'aaun'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Kya main andar aaun? Haan, mera ek prashna hai. Is samasya ka samadhan kya hai? Main pratiksha karunga.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You sound highly educated and extremely polite.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the vocabulary list. Do not use Urdu or English words. Intezaar becomes Pratiksha. Sawaal becomes Prashna.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. When asking 'May I?', always drop the 'ga' from the future tense. 'Aaunga' becomes 'Aaun'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: क्या मैं अंदर आऊँ? हाँ, मेरा एक प्रश्न है। इस समस्या का समाधान क्या है? मैं प्रतीक्षा करूँगा।

hintText: To ask permission politely, cut the end off the future tense. Main karunga -> Main karun.
